overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a dark, rainy back alley at night. The character walks through foggy, decaying urban environments illuminated by streetlights, passing abandoned vehicles and debris, eventually approaching a bloodstain and picking up a melee weapon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open back alley with street lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy alley toward a distant streetlight

notable_agents.action: abandoned van parked on the right side of the alley

entered.detail: tall streetlight illuminating the foggy alley ahead
tall brick wall of adjacent building running along the left side
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting the streetlight glow
trash and debris littering the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark, rainy back alley at night. A streetlight illuminates the foggy path ahead while an abandoned van sits parked on the right. The wet asphalt reflects the artificial lighting, creating a gloomy atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the abandoned van toward a brick gate

notable_agents.action: abandoned van passing by on the right side

entered.detail: large brick archway with metal bars blocking the path ahead
wooden plank fence running alongside the right wall
pile of wooden pallets and trash near the fence

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a brick gate structure at the end of the alley, passing the abandoned van on the right. A wooden fence and debris pile become visible as the streetlight recedes behind.

events.description: character turns left to enter narrow passage beside the gate

agents.ego_description: turning left to squeeze past the gate into a narrower passage

notable_agents.action: abandoned white car parked in the narrow passage

entered.detail: derelict white sedan parked along the right wall
concrete overhang providing partial cover from the rain
dark opening leading to a covered alleyway ahead

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to navigate past the brick gate into a narrower passage. An abandoned white car sits parked on the right beneath a concrete overhang, while a dark tunnel entrance looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley with decaying walls

events.description: enters narrow covered alleyway with decaying brick walls and overhead cover
bloodstain becomes visible on the ground ahead

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the claustrophobic covered alley

entered.detail: solid concrete ceiling covering the narrow alley
crumbling brick walls with peeling paint and water damage
industrial lights mounted on the alley walls
rusted metal barrel sitting against the right wall
metal pipe railing running along the left wall
large red bloodstain on the concrete floor ahead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a claustrophobic covered alley with decaying brick walls and industrial lighting. Metal barrels and debris line the path as a disturbing bloodstain comes into view on the ground ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dead end with bloodstain and weapon

events.description: character stops and picks up metal pipe weapon from ground near bloodstain

agents.ego_description: approaching the bloodstain and picking up a metal pipe from the ground

entered.detail: bloodied metal pipe lying on the ground next to the bloodstain

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the bloodstain at the end of the alley and stops to pick up a metal pipe weapon lying on the ground. The scene ends with the character armed, standing over the bloodstain in the narrow covered passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban alleyway that gradually narrows into a dark, claustrophobic passage. It begins with the character walking along wet asphalt under the glow of a streetlight, passing an abandoned van as the artificial light reflects off the rainy ground. As the character moves forward, the streetlight recedes and the environment shifts toward a brick gate structure flanked by a wooden fence and piles of debris. The scene then turns left to navigate past the gate, entering a tighter corridor where an abandoned white car sits beneath a concrete overhang. Finally, the camera pushes forward as the open alleyway gives way to the looming entrance of a dark tunnel.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic urban corridor that culminates in the discovery of a weapon. It begins as the character enters a covered alleyway, moving past decaying brick walls and industrial lighting while navigating around metal barrels and scattered debris. As the camera advances deeper into the narrow passage, a disturbing bloodstain emerges on the ground ahead. The scene then shifts focus as the character approaches the stain and stops to pick up a metal pipe lying in the grime. Finally, the shot settles on the character standing armed and alert over the bloodstain within the oppressive confines of the alley.
